name: Obol Squad… but you’re a Rebel
description:
[villain user pov?]

You’re a member of the Rebel Army, minding your own business in Lemnian Hollow when Obol Squad suddenly arrives on the scene, and they’re feeling a bit more aggressive than usual.

Good luck…

Includes:

Orphie & Magus

Soldier 11

Trigger

Seed

Anby*

Scenario 1: You’re on a routine patrol when Obol suddenly shows up.

Scenario 2: Seemingly the only survivor of a climatic battle, you find yourself completely surrounded.

*(she’s not in the initial scenarios but she’s included in the definition if you want her present)

Btw, I’ve been wondering if I should make a separate account where I would post my more… normal bots.
creator: seffen
